title: PanelSpec v2 (render contract)
description: Citeseer's PanelSpec lineage with the named 2nd-pass extensions: query_ref indirection (replaces inlined SQL; the provenance peek resolves the ref), stat bindings for prose, and layout as data. Charts and investigation-tree state are data — savable, replayable, renderer-agnostic (spatial/Godot render the same specs).

type.description: citeseer's ten + text (prose with stat bindings) + refusal (the honest no).

query_ref.description: NEW v2: durable ref to the executed query (query-result.query_ref). Replaces citeseer's inlined per-panel sql. Peek ('Show the math.') and re-run resolve this. null only for text/refusal panels.

prose.description: text panels: markdown with stat bindings {{stat:<query_ref>#<column>[agg]}} — each renders as a live, proved, drillable inline number. Unbound numbers are visibly unproven.

refusal.description: refusal panels: the feasibility gate's honest no — reason + realign suggestions. No hallucinated chart.

locked.description: Manual user move locks the slot against later auto-arranges.

layout.description: NEW v2: layout as data on a 12-col grid model (window.arrange writes this). State, not pixels.

pattern.description: Bus pattern that refreshes this panel.

live.description: NEW v2: live binding — the panel subscribes and re-runs its query_ref on matching emissions.
